## How to add yourself

- Open a pull request adding your name, role, GitHub profile link, and a short note about your contribution.

## Notes

- This list is community-maintained. Adding your name does not imply formal maintainership unless explicitly stated.
- For contribution guidelines, see [CONTRIBUTING](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
